methods.name: matchIL
methods.description: Match STRIKE IL opcode-tree patterns and return nodes plus wildcard bindings.
methods.example: strike.matchIL({ opcode: 'call', operands: [{ wildcard: true, bind: 'target' }] })

methods.name: buildXRefIndex.callersOf
methods.description: Return call references targeting an address from a ProgramAnalysis cross-reference index.

methods.name: buildXRefIndex.calleesFrom
methods.description: Return direct calls made from an address using the ProgramAnalysis cross-reference index.

methods.name: resolveConstantAnnotation
methods.description: Explain known Win32/API constants for an import argument position when a prototype is known.

methods.name: getRecoveredStructs
methods.description: Recover advisory struct-like field groups from repeated IL memory accesses.

methods.name: registerHook
methods.description: Register isolated STRIKE extension hooks. Hook failures are logged and do not replace GYRE authority.

methods.name: buildFunctionIntelligence
methods.description: Build the advisory per-function evidence notebook model from static analysis, pseudocode, and runtime snapshot evidence.

methods.name: exportFunctionIntelligenceJSON
methods.description: Export Function Intelligence JSON with GYRE sole-verdict and advisory-only envelope fields.
